title: Input schema for Terms of Service Watchdog
description: Enter the old and new URLs of the Terms of Service pages to compare, along with your OpenAI API key. The Actor will analyze changes and assess legal risks.

old_url.title: Old URL
old_url.description: URL of the old/previous version of the Terms of Service to compare

new_url.title: New URL
new_url.description: URL of the new/current version of the Terms of Service to compare

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API Key
openai_api_key.description: OpenAI API key for GPT-4o-mini analysis. This key is used to analyze legal risks in the Terms of Service changes. Keep this key secure and do not share it publicly.
